mapper.sql: USER_ID, USERNAME, PASSWORD, NAME, RIGHTS, ROLE_ID, LAST_LOGIN, IP, STATUS, BZ, PHONE, SEX, SFID, START_TIME, END_TIME, YEARS, NUMBER, EMAIL, PARENT_ID, INNER_CODE, ADDRESS, BANK, BANK_NUMBER, BANK_NAME, ALIPAY, WECHAT, OPEN_ID, UNION_ID, PROXYSTATE
mapper.select:
select
from
where 1 = 1 and ( USERNAME = #{USERNAME} or PHONE = #{USERNAME} or OPEN_ID = #{USERNAME} or UNION_ID = #{USERNAME})

select
from
where INNER_CODE LIKE CONCAT(#{INNER_CODE},'%')
mapper.update:
update
set
USERNAME = #{USERNAME},
NAME = #{NAME},
LAST_LOGIN = #{LAST_LOGIN},
ROLE_ID = #{ROLE_ID},
BZ = #{BZ},
PHONE = #{PHONE},
SEX = #{SEX},
SFID = #{SFID},
START_TIME = #{START_TIME},
END_TIME = #{END_TIME},
YEARS = #{YEARS},
STATUS = #{STATUS},
NUMBER = #{NUMBER},
EMAIL = #{EMAIL},
PARENT_ID = #{PARENT_ID},
INNER_CODE = #{INNER_CODE},
PASSWORD = #{PASSWORD},
ADDRESS = #{ADDRESS},
BANK = #{BANK},
BANK_NUMBER = #{BANK_NUMBER},
BANK_NAME = #{BANK_NAME},
ALIPAY = #{ALIPAY},
WECHAT = #{WECHAT},
OPEN_ID = #{OPEN_ID},
UNION_ID = #{UNION_ID},
PROXYSTATE = #{PROXYSTATE},
USER_ID = #{USER_ID} where USER_ID = #{USER_ID}
mapper.select: select u.*, ifnull((select count(1) from sys_app_user where INNER_CODE !=u.INNER_CODE and INNER_CODE like concat(u.INNER_CODE,'%') and ifnull(LENGTH(u.INNER_CODE),0)+64>=ifnull(LENGTH(INNER_CODE),0) ) ,0) as USER_NUM, ifnull((select sum(o.ORDER_TOTAL) from SHOP_ORDER o where o.USER_ID in (select USER_ID from SYS_APP_USER where INNER_CODE !=u.INNER_CODE and INNER_CODE like concat(u.INNER_CODE,'%') and ifnull(LENGTH(u.INNER_CODE),0)+64>=ifnull(LENGTH(INNER_CODE),0) ) and o.status in (1,2,5,6)),0) as ORDER_TOTAL, (ifnull(((select sum(o.ORDER_TOTAL) from SHOP_ORDER o where o.USER_ID in (select USER_ID from SYS_APP_USER where INNER_CODE !=u.INNER_CODE and INNER_CODE like concat(u.INNER_CODE,'%') and ifnull(LENGTH(u.INNER_CODE),0)+32=ifnull(LENGTH(INNER_CODE),0) ) and o.status in (1,2,5,6))*(select n.COMMISION_RATIO from SHOP_COMMISION n where n.COMMISION_SORT=1 ))/10000,0) +ifnull(((select sum(o.ORDER_TOTAL) from SHOP_ORDER o where o.USER_ID in (select USER_ID from SYS_APP_USER where INNER_CODE !=u.INNER_CODE and INNER_CODE like concat(u.INNER_CODE,'%') and ifnull(LENGTH(u.INNER_CODE),0)+64=ifnull(LENGTH(INNER_CODE),0) ) and o.status in (1,2,5,6))*(select n.COMMISION_RATIO from SHOP_COMMISION n where n.COMMISION_SORT=2 ))/10000,0) -ifnull((select sum(TB_APPUSERWITHDRAW.WITHDRAWTOTAL) from TB_APPUSERWITHDRAW where USERID=u.USER_ID ),0))as COMMISION_TOTAL from SYS_APP_USER u where u.USER_ID = #{USER_ID}

select , ifnull((select count(1) from sys_app_user where INNER_CODE !=u.INNER_CODE and INNER_CODE like concat(u.INNER_CODE,'%') and ifnull(LENGTH(u.INNER_CODE),0)+64>=ifnull(LENGTH(INNER_CODE),0) ) ,0) as USER_NUM, ifnull((select sum(o.ORDER_TOTAL) from SHOP_ORDER o where o.USER_ID in (select USER_ID from SYS_APP_USER where INNER_CODE !=u.INNER_CODE and INNER_CODE like concat(u.INNER_CODE,'%') and ifnull(LENGTH(u.INNER_CODE),0)+64>=ifnull(LENGTH(INNER_CODE),0) ) and o.status in (1,2,5,6)),0) as ORDER_TOTAL, (ifnull(((select sum(o.ORDER_TOTAL) from SHOP_ORDER o where o.USER_ID in (select USER_ID from SYS_APP_USER where INNER_CODE !=u.INNER_CODE and INNER_CODE like concat(u.INNER_CODE,'%') and ifnull(LENGTH(u.INNER_CODE),0)+32=ifnull(LENGTH(INNER_CODE),0) ) and o.status in (1,2,5,6))*(select n.COMMISION_RATIO from SHOP_COMMISION n where n.COMMISION_SORT=1 ))/10000,0) +ifnull(((select sum(o.ORDER_TOTAL) from SHOP_ORDER o where o.USER_ID in (select USER_ID from SYS_APP_USER where INNER_CODE !=u.INNER_CODE and INNER_CODE like concat(u.INNER_CODE,'%') and ifnull(LENGTH(u.INNER_CODE),0)+64=ifnull(LENGTH(INNER_CODE),0) ) and o.status in (1,2,5,6))*(select n.COMMISION_RATIO from SHOP_COMMISION n where n.COMMISION_SORT=2 ))/10000,0) -ifnull((select sum(TB_APPUSERWITHDRAW.WITHDRAWTOTAL) from TB_APPUSERWITHDRAW where USERID=u.USER_ID ),0))as COMMISION_TOTAL from SYS_APP_USER u where u.USER_ID = #{pd.USER_ID}

select u.USER_ID, concat(u.USERNAME,'(',u.NAME,')') as USERNAME, u.NAME, u.PARENT_ID from
u,
r where u.ROLE_ID = r.ROLE_ID and r.PARENT_ID = '2' and u.PARENT_ID = #{parentId} order by u.NAME

select u.USER_ID, u.USERNAME, ifnull((select sum(o.ORDER_TOTAL) from SHOP_ORDER o where o.USER_ID in (select USER_ID from SYS_APP_USER where INNER_CODE like concat(u.INNER_CODE,'%') and INNER_CODE != u.INNER_CODE) and o.status in (1,2,5,6)),0) as ORDER_TOTAL, ifnull((((select sum(o.ORDER_TOTAL) from SHOP_ORDER o where o.USER_ID in (select USER_ID from SYS_APP_USER where INNER_CODE like concat(u.INNER_CODE,'%') and INNER_CODE != u.INNER_CODE) and o.status in (1,2,5,6)))*(select n.COMMISION_RATIO from SHOP_COMMISION n where n.COMMISION_SORT=(ifnull(LENGTH(u.INNER_CODE),0)/32)))/10000,0) as COMMISION_TOTAL from SYS_APP_USER u,SYS_ROLE r where u.ROLE_ID = r.ROLE_ID and r.PARENT_ID = '2'
and u.PARENT_ID=#{pd.USER_ID}

select
from u where 1 =1
and ifnull(LENGTH(u.INNER_CODE),0)= ifnull(LENGTH(#{pd.INNER_CODE}),0)+32 and u.INNER_CODE like concat(#{pd.INNER_CODE},'%')
and ifnull(LENGTH(u.INNER_CODE),0) = ifnull(LENGTH(#{pd.INNER_CODE}),0)+64 and u.INNER_CODE like concat(#{pd.INNER_CODE},'%')

select u.USER_ID, u.USERNAME, u.NAME, u.RIGHTS as USER_RIGHTS, u.PASSWORD, 'no-skin' as SKIN, r.ROLE_ID, r.ROLE_NAME, r.RIGHTS as ROLE_RIGHTS from u left join r on u.ROLE_ID=r.ROLE_ID where u.STATUS=1 and u.USER_ID=#{USER_ID}
